title: Necode
description: Usually modpacks add a lot of global mods that drastically change the game, that's why i decided to make my own that is focused on ComputerCraft, and also allows users to express themselves with custom music, images and such inside the game.
body:
Modpack has three main directions for expansion:

## Building diversity.
My goal here is to stay in a vanilla-like state while adding things that spice up the builds. The following mods accomplish that:
1. **Immersive Paintings** - allows to add custom decals on top of blocks as well as any custom image as a painting with a nice frame.
2. **Bits & Chisels** - unlocks boundless creativity by allowing to carve out any shape out of vanilla blocks
![Bits & Chisels example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ca6b4974418e4d95780bcdcc1b8db5575014ecf_0.webp)

## Programmable Automatization
Goal here is to add automatization - but not too cheesy. Writing scripts and creating contraptions should require considerable effort, or it will simply feel like you cheesed the game.
1. **CC: Tweaked** - adds computers and turtles
2. **Turtlematic** - adds additional capabilities for turtles
3. **Peripheralium** - adds additional peripherals

## Fun features
1. **AudioPlayer** - allows to add any music to any music disk and enjoy it with friends
2. **Shaders** - just makes the game that much prettier
3. **Figura** - unlocks a whole world of custom player models

## QOL
1. **Litematica** - simplifies building process by allowing to create ghost schematics
2. **Shulker+** - allows to render custom blocks on top of shulkers for easier identification
3. **Various tooltip mods** - WAILA-like things that allow for easier identification of items, blocks and inventory contents.
4. **ChestTracker** - makes the task for searching for items so much easier - you just type item you want and it shows you where you placed it
